task_completion.description: Verify that the built-in PDF viewer is disabled in Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows Tor Browser navigated to 'about:config' with the preference 'pdfjs.disabled' searched and its value set to 'true'.

task_completion.description: Verify that WebGL rendering is disabled in Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows Tor Browser navigated to 'about:config' with the preference 'webgl.disabled' searched and its value set to 'true'.

task_completion.description: Verify that WebAssembly execution is disabled in Tor Browser.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows Tor Browser navigated to 'about:config' with the preference 'javascript.options.wasm' searched and its value set to 'false'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the agent navigates to the correct URL to download the TLS 1.3 specification.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows Tor Browser's address bar containing 'https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/pdfrfc/rfc8446.txt.pdf' or a download prompt originating from this URL.

task_completion.description: Verify that the PDF file is saved to the specified Quarantine directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows a 'Save As' dialog with the destination folder set to 'Quarantine' (inside Documents) and the filename 'rfc8446.pdf', or a file manager displaying the downloaded file in '/home/ga/Documents/Quarantine'.

integrity.description: Verify that preferences were modified using the Tor Browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'about:config' page should be visible in the browser window. The agent should not be using a terminal or text editor to modify 'prefs.js'.

integrity.description: Verify that the file was downloaded using Tor Browser.
integrity.visual_evidence: The download should occur via the browser's download manager or 'Save As' dialog. The agent should not use terminal commands like 'wget' or 'curl' to download the file.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually saves the downloaded file rather than creating a fake file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save As' dialog or browser download progress should be visible, confirming the file is being saved from the browser, not created via terminal commands like 'touch' or 'echo'.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Target Directory: /home/ga/Documents/Quarantine
Target File: /home/ga/Documents/Quarantine/rfc8446.pdf
Target URL: https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/pdfrfc/rfc8446.txt.pdf
Required Preferences in about:config: pdfjs.disabled=true, webgl.disabled=true, javascript.options.wasm=false.
